attributes.action: UK Government should not let US to use UK military bases to strike Iran.
attributes.additional_details:
Because COL are going up, it's a genocide in Iran, and it's illegal and a violation in the United Nations.

This can affect community cohesion and international allies and yet put us in debt like how United States was.
attributes.background: To not allow United States to use United Kingdom military bases to strike the Islamic Republic of Iran, it's a violation in UN and the war shouldn't be our responsibility, and this might drag us into the war which isn't right.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Stop allowing the US to use British bases for any action against Iran
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/762916
